data.title: Crypto market cap erases $110 billion  in huge 1-day crash
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market shedded approximately $110 billion from its total market cap within less than 24 hours as it suffered another dramatic crash this week. According to data retrieved by Finbold from CoinMarketCap, the global market capitalization dropped from $3.86 trillion on October 15 (12:00 p.m
source: https://finbold.com/crypto-market-cap-erases-110-billion-in-huge-1-day-crash/

data.title: Fed Governor Waller: US GDP may weaken by the end of this year
data.description: Federal Reserve Board Governor Waller said that US GDP may weaken at the end of this year. The Fed's Beige Book does not show a bright future, but there seems to be no sign of a significant increase in inflation. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed Governor Waller: A 25 basis point rate cut is possible
data.description: Fed Governor Waller: We can cut interest rates by 25 basis points and see what happens, so as to get a clearer idea. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed Governor Waller: Successfully completed interview for Fed Chairman position
data.description: Federal Reserve Board Governor Waller stated that he has successfully completed the interview process for the Fed Chair position. He stated that the interview process went smoothly and that he had a pleasant meeting with U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson. Progress was rapid. He has not yet spoken with President Trump and is unclear whether he will. (Jinshi)

data.title: Crypto fund C1 Fund announced that it has purchased a stake in Chainalysis
data.description: Crypto fund C1 Fund announced it has acquired a stake in Chainalysis, a blockchain data and compliance security platform. Details such as the purchase amount and equity percentage have not yet been disclosed. C1 Fund reportedly previously announced a $60 million IPO, intending to increase its investment in digital asset technology and acquiring a stake in Ripple. (Businesswire)

data.title: Echo: Users who have participated in investments on the Echo platform will receive Monad airdrops
data.description: Echo announced on the X platform that anyone who has previously invested on the Echo platform will be eligible to receive the Monad airdrop. Officials said they will soon release detailed instructions for adding and submitting their claim information on the Monad official website.

data.title: OKX Expands Standard Chartered Custody Partnership to Europe for Safer Institutional Trading
data.description:
OKX expanded its custody partnership with Standard Chartered to Europe, offering bank-grade protection.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/okx-expands-standard-chartered-custody-partnership-to-europe-for-safer-institutional-trading/

data.title: The whale that opened a $140 million short position yesterday has begun to increase its BTC long position, with the position size temporarily reported at $24.52 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684 xtpa), the whale address that opened a $140 million BTC short position yesterday (which had previously closed its short position and switched to long) has begun to increase its BTC long position. The current position is as follows: BTC 5 x long position: holding $24.52 million (220.73 coins), opening price $111,066.5; ETH 3 x long position: holding $49.03 million (12,144.3 coins), opening price $4,050.

data.title: Planet Evening News | October 16
data.description: 1. A whale shorting $140 million in BTC switched to a long position of 68.42 BTC and placed a $14.65 million BTC buy order near $111,000. 2. Majidage's positions were partially liquidated, having lost over $53 million on Hyperliquid in the past month. 3. Meteora: The airdrop inquiry website will open on Thursday. 4. Binance Wallet's Astra Nova presale exceeded its subscription by 520 times. 5. The total supply of RLUSD on Aave reached 448 million, a new record high. 6. Binance Alpha will list ANOME (ANOME) and SubHub (SUBHUB). 7. The first phase of the Aster airdrop claim will end in one day. 8. Two newly created wallets withdrew a total of 1,465 BTC, worth $162 million, from Binance and FalconX. 9. Jefferies: US Treasury yields have limited room to fall; 10. Bitwise: SOL collateralized ETP asset management scale exceeds US$100 million, and ETH collateralized ETP exceeds US$300 million; 11. OKX will officially delist SLERF, ALPHA and other token trading pairs on October 23; 12. CZ: Coinbase should list more BNB Chain projects; 13. Billionaire Tim Draper: Bitcoin will reach US$250,000 within a year; 14. Delphi Digital: The BTC top signal dashboard has not yet issued a cycle top signal; 15. An early Bitcoin whale transferred 2,000 BTC to 51 new wallets, worth US$222 million.

data.title: Bull Fractal Reveals 385.4% Solana Price Prediction In 2025
data.description:
Key Insights: A bullish market fractal pointed to a potential Solana price surge of 385% rally, projecting a move toward the $1,000 mark. The forecast by crypto analyst Solana Sensei, drew comparisons between the current market setup in 2025 and the structure seen during the 2020 cycle. Moreover, data from Binance showed that Solana’s put-to-call […] The post Bull Fractal Reveals 385
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/16/bull-fractal-reveals-385-solana-price-prediction-in-2025/

data.title: Sony Shocks Wall Street: Tech Giant Seeks U.S. Bank License to Issue Its Own Stablecoin
data.description:
Sony has filed for a U. S. bank license through its subsidiary Connectia Trust to issue a dollar-backed stablecoin, joining major firms awaiting OCC approval for national crypto banking operations.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/sony-seeks-u-s-bank-license-to-issue-its-own-stablecoin/

data.title: CME Group Q3 2025 Crypto Derivatives Trading Volume Reaches $901 Billion, a Record High
data.description: CME Group reported that its crypto derivatives trading volume reached $901 billion in the third quarter of 2025, a record high. (Solid Intel)

data.title: deBridge uses the new domain name debridge.com. The original domain name will be redirected after 30 days.
data.description: deBridge announced on the X platform that it has officially migrated from debridge.finance to the new domain debridge.com and launched its new app at app.debridge.com. The original domain app.debridge.finance will remain available for the next 30 days, after which it will automatically redirect to the new domain. All features, including real-time cross-chain swaps, same-chain swaps, limit orders, P2P transactions, and developer integrations, are currently operational. The migration will not affect any ongoing transactions, user data, or API integrations.

data.title: Fed Governor Milan: The Fed should cut interest rates by 50 basis points, but it is expected to cut by 25 basis points
data.description: Fed Governor Milan: The Fed should cut interest rates by 50 basis points, but it is expected to actually cut by 25 basis points. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tether Donates $250,000 to Support OpenSats Initiatives
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tether has announced a donation of $250,000 to OpenSats, a 501(c)(3) public charity dedicated to funding contributors and projects that enhance Bitcoin and promote open, censorship-resistant technologies. The donation will support OpenSats' operations and funding efforts, enabling it to continue providing financial support to a range of free open-source projects. These projects encompass areas such as protocol development, privacy tools, research, and education. OpenSats allocates 100% of the funds directly to beneficiaries, maintaining its operations through separate donations and adhering to its transparent philanthropic mission.

data.title: Visa says it hopes to build infrastructure for lending in "on-chain finance"
data.description: Visa released a report titled "Stablecoins: Beyond Payments—The On-Chain Lending Opportunity," redefining decentralized finance as "on-chain finance." The report aims to make decentralized credit more institutionally accessible in the GENIUS Act era and outlines how banks and private credit funds can integrate into this system. Visa envisions institutions becoming liquidity providers for programmable lending protocols, with Visa providing data, compliance, and infrastructure services. Its well-known brand and reliable channels are expected to attract trillions of dollars in institutional capital. The white paper demonstrates Visa's shift from cryptocurrency experimentation to institutional infrastructure development. Since 2020, the "on-chain finance" market has issued over $670 billion in stablecoin loans, reaching a new high in mid-2025. This demonstrates that stablecoins have become a pillar of the automated credit market, capable of continuous operation and instant settlement. Visa's strategy for on-chain finance resembles traditional finance: it does not issue tokens or directly fund loans, but rather engages in technology-based businesses without lending risk. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Charles Schwab Reports Strong Q3 2025 Results on Client Growth and Efficiency
data.description:
Charles Schwab delivered Q3 EPS of $1. 31 on $6. 1 billion in revenue, exceeding estimates and reflecting strong client inflows.
source: https://tokenist.com/charles-schwab-reports-strong-q3-2025-results-on-client-growth-and-efficiency/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=charles-schwab-reports-strong-q3-2025-results-on-client-growth-and-efficiency

data.title: Analysts: BTC whales are closer to position adjustments rather than large-scale withdrawals, as leverage liquidation and interest rate cut expectations remain, and the market remains optimistic at the end of the year.
data.description: Timothy Misir, head of research at BRN, pointed out: "Bitcoin is testing the key support level of $110,000, as whales reduce their holdings and demand for put options soars. The trading volume of large put options exceeded $1.15 billion, accounting for 28% of the capital flow, while call options are still concentrated in the range of $115,000 to $130,000. This is a selective adjustment of positions, not panic selling." He added that although large holders of 100,000 to 10,000 BTC reduced their holdings by about 17,500, they are still net buyers this year, with a cumulative increase of more than 318,000, which is closer to a position adjustment rather than a large-scale withdrawal. Matt Mena, research strategist at 21 Shares, emphasized, "Bitcoin's resilience amidst macro headwinds and aggressive deleveraging demonstrates that structural demand, anchored by ETF inflows and dovish policy expectations, remains supportive." US ETFs have attracted over $6 billion in the past month. He noted, "With leverage unwinding and policy easing approaching, the year-end outlook is becoming increasingly positive." If institutional demand persists, Bitcoin could still reach $150,000. However, short-term technicals remain fragile: a break below $110,000 could lead to a drop to the $104,000-$108,000 range; a recapture of $115,000 would rekindle bullish momentum. (The Block)

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Declines to 29, Reflecting Market Shift
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Altcoin Season Index has dropped to 29, as reported by Coinmarketcap data. This marks a significant decrease from its peak of 78 on September 20. Last week's average was 51, while last month's average stood at 71. The index indicates that in the past 90 days, approximately 29 out of the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization have outperformed Bitcoin.

The CMC Altcoin Season Index serves as a real-time indicator to assess whether the cryptocurrency market is currently dominated by altcoins. It evaluates the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the past 90 days.

data.title: Silver on track to displace BTC as the best-performing asset for 2025
data.description:
Silver is catching up with BTC in terms of growth for the year to date. Another BTC dip may put silver in the top position, as the fastest-appreciating asset in 2025.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/silver-to-displace-btc-best-performing-asset/
